title: Polling Preparations Intensify Across Karur
summary: Authorities across Karur district have significantly stepped up preparations for the upcoming polling day, ensuring that all logistical, administrative, and security arrangements are in place. Polling booths have been equipped with Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs), VVPAT units, drinking water facilities, shaded waiting areas, and ramps for elderly and differently-abled voters. Officials conducted multiple inspections and inter-departmental coordination meetings involving police, health, and transport departments. Special attention has been given to rural and remote villages to ensure smooth accessibility and participation.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Cash Monitoring
summary: Election flying squads and surveillance teams have intensified monitoring across Karur district to prevent illegal cash distribution and voter inducement. Multiple vehicle checks were conducted on highways and rural routes, leading to the seizure of unaccounted money. Authorities are working with income tax officials to investigate suspicious transactions. Citizens have been encouraged to report violations, and strict legal action has been promised against offenders.

title: Campaigning Concludes with Local Focus
summary: Political parties concluded their campaigns with rallies, public meetings, and door-to-door outreach across Karur district. Candidates highlighted key issues such as infrastructure development, employment opportunities, water management, and textile industry growth. The final day saw increased voter engagement before the silence period came into effect.

title: Security Strengthened in Sensitive Zones
summary: Security has been intensified across Karur district with the deployment of additional police personnel and central forces. Checkposts have been established at key entry and exit points, and continuous patrols are being conducted in sensitive areas. Control rooms have been set up to respond quickly to any incidents, ensuring a peaceful election environment.

title: Transport Arrangements Finalized for Poll Day
summary: The transport department has arranged special buses and vehicles to facilitate the movement of polling staff and election materials across Karur district. Particular attention has been given to remote areas to ensure timely deployment without disruption.

title: Healthcare Services Strengthened for Polling
summary: Medical teams, ambulances, and first-aid centers have been deployed near polling booths to handle emergencies, especially heat-related illnesses. Authorities have advised voters to stay hydrated and avoid peak heat hours.

title: Heatwave Conditions Continue Across District
summary: Karur district continues to experience high temperatures, affecting daily routines. Authorities have issued advisories urging residents to take precautions while participating in voting.

title: Awareness Campaigns Boost Voter Participation
summary: Authorities have intensified awareness campaigns through announcements and outreach programs to encourage maximum voter turnout, especially among youth and rural populations.

title: Mock Polls Ensure EVM Readiness
summary: Election officials conducted mock polling exercises to ensure proper functioning of EVMs and VVPAT units. All systems have been verified and declared ready.

title: Crackdown on Election Violations
summary: Police carried out raids across Karur district and seized illegal cash and liquor intended for distribution during elections. Cases have been registered.

title: Night Patrols Intensified
summary: Police increased night patrols in sensitive areas to prevent any untoward incidents ahead of polling.

title: Sanitation Drives Completed
summary: Municipal authorities carried out cleaning drives near polling stations to maintain hygiene.

title: Textile Sector Shows Stability
summary: Karur’s textile industry maintained steady operations despite election-related slowdowns.

title: Emergency Teams on High Alert
summary: Emergency services including fire and rescue teams have been placed on standby.

title: Schools Closed for Polling
summary: Schools have been declared holidays as they are used as polling booths.

summary: Residents stocked up on groceries and essentials ahead of polling day restrictions.
